comments.author: @bosezwitolo8382
comments.text: Dumela! The Delta is a beautiful place and refreshing to watch Botswana. Something to add, it is nolonger acceptable to say there are 8 main or major tribes. It was something that was even in school books in the 80's & 90's becoz during the protectorate times the British selected 8 Tswana tribes for their administration purposes. In modern Botswana we want a society that belong to all its pple whether Tswana or Non Tswana without hierarchies, thats why it was stopped. And what is interesting of the 8 tribes selected by the British non is senior according to Tswana culture. In Setswana culture Bahurutshi are the more senior who are not part of the former 8 main tribes.

replies.author: @bosezwitolo8382
replies.text: The San are the first pple to settle in the area that is now called Botswana, but the Tswana speaking pple are not the first Bantu to settle in area. The first Bantu pple to settle in the area are those found in the northern part of the country who are still there. The evidence is the archaeological remains of stones ruins similar to bo Zimbabwe and Khami Ruins which is usually found were ever they settled. Other Bantu (Mbukushu and Bayei) pple are those in north west of the country who again non-Tswana the really custodian with San of the wildlife. Again all this corrections not done through civil strife but through mafoko a kgotla amantle, mmua lebe. We have heard in some African countries pple kill each other becoz they belong to a different tribes. Hope again we learn from wild dogs.

comments.author: @SubraSam-e7o
comments.text: Botswana  is the jewel of Africa. It is my second home. We love Motswana. My  favourite students  became Member of Parliament.BDP party member from Molepolele constituency. I love my business subjects teachers whom I supervised as a first PEO in 2002 to 2005. I served in this humblest countries in the world from 1993 to 2008. It was my golden period of my life. I supervised my teachers from Gaborone to all over the country.  I am planning bringing more investors from 5 biggest economy of the Earth India sooner. My heroes karma, opp leader then, present president I saw that gentleman was grooming like a power advocate now he becomes a competent President. Appreciate reporter who have done a wonderful homework and research. Observed visited Botswana also Dumela to my motswana people.  World loves you. I cried with joy when Kanye young man Tebego won in Olympic gold metal and he became world ambassador  for Botswana, Love you all.pula, pula, pula. Prof. Sam ( Ex. PEO Business subjects, secondary department,MOE,Botswana.

comments.author: @HoangKien-p3s
comments.text: The sight of hundreds of elephants bathing in the Chobe River and the experience of riding a Mokoro canoe to admire the Okavango nature gave me goosebumps! I was so impressed by the 130,000 elephants safely protected here. Botswana will definitely be at the top of my must-visit list.
